entry.message: Community agent run in suggestion mode

window.operatingHours: Agent scans the current PST day. Live-support hours come from project guidelines or project memory.

items.message:
Hey team! 👋

Today's [**Stargazer daily thread**](https://community.outlier.ai/t/daily-thread-07-17/2904938) is up.

Please take a few minutes to read it before tasking today. The topic is **Prompt Quality**, with a reminder about **If you can't write F2P tests without reading the gold patch, your prompt is too vague.**.

Quick rule: Write your F2P tests before touching the gold patch. If you can't, the prompt needs more behavioral specificity.



Use the daily thread for blockers, Cursor issues, validation/eval problems, onboarding questions, or task-related doubts 🙌
items.ignoredReason: Manager announcement authored by the configured bot user, not a contributor support request.

items.message:
Hey everyone,

As the Stargazer Axiom project begins to wind down, I wanted to take a moment, on behalf of myself and the entire Stargazer team, to thank you all for the work you’ve done over the past few weeks.

There are still a few tasks available, but these will likely be among the final ones. I know many of you may already have secondary projects or may be transitioning to new ones, so there’s no need to worry if activity starts slowing down.

Your effort, patience, and consistency made a real difference. We truly appreciate the quality of work you delivered and your participation in the daily threads, war rooms, and support channels.

This is not really a goodbye, just a “see you later.” It has been a pleasure working with and supporting all of you, and we hope we get the chance to work together again on another project soon. 🚀

Thank you again for being such a great team.
items.ignoredReason: Authored by the configured manager/bot user.
